title: Page Agent Local Lab
description: Local interoperability experiment with Alibaba Page Agent — documentation page with deterministic mock adapter

integration.bundle_status: page-agent@1.12.1 does not expose a usable non-demo browser bundle for static integration. ESM module (722 B) requires bundler + @page-agent/* dependencies. IIFE demo bundle (209 KB) is excluded per experiment policy (auto-init, free testing API, CDN references).
